  • Ferrero

Ferrero Collection Rocher Raffaello Rondnoir Chocolate Gift Box 15 Pack | 172g

$9.50
Save $9.50
$5.52/ 100g | Was $19.00

Other options

  • Ferrero Collection Rocher Raffaello Rondnoir Chocolate Gift Box 24 Pack | 269g
    $32.00
    $11.90/ 100g

Product details

9 Ferrero Rocher, a tempting combination made of a whole crunchy hazelnut in the centre, a delicious creamy hazelnut chocolate filling, a crisp wafer shell covered with milk chocolate and gently roasted hazelnut pieces.

3 Raffaello, a precious heart of white almond enveloped in a delicious creamy filling, all enclosed in a crispy wafer shell scattered with fragrant coconut flakes.

3 Rondnoir, a delicious combination of dark chocolate heart and a rich creamy cocoa filling, all surrounded by a crispy wafer shell coated with fine dark chocolate.

Each delicacy is individually wrapped and presented in an elegant chocolate box. The perfect gift to make any celebration or occassion special including this Christmas.
  • A Unique Multi-Layered Christmas Indulgence: From the satisfying crunch of Ferrero Rocher's crunchy hazelnut centre, Raffaello's white almond and coconut flakes, and Rondnoir's dark chocolate and creamy cocoa combination, every bite is a festive adventure for your senses. It's a must-have for Christmas parties and family gatherings.

  • Premium Quality, Always: We use only the finest ingredients, ensuring a truly luxurious chocolate experience that elevates any Christmas occasion or holiday table.

  • Individually Wrapped for Freshness and Sharing: Each Ferrero Collection praline is elegantly wrapped in its signature foil, making them perfect for sharing with family and friends or adding a touch of sparkle to your Christmas hamper. They are the easiest way to give a little luxury!

  • The Epitome of Thoughtful Gift Giving: Make a lasting impression with these iconic pralines. They are a symbol of care and sophistication, making them the ideal stocking stuffer, secret Santa gift, or elegant present for that special someone this holiday season. They truly are the best Christmas chocolate.

  • Make your Christmas unforgettable. Find the perfect Ferrero Collection gift pack for all your holiday gifting needs!

    • Made in Poland/Germany

    • DARK CHOCOLATE (40.5%) (SUGAR, COCOA MASS, COCOA BUTTER, EMULSIFIER: LECITHINS (SOY), FLAVOURING: VANILLIN), SUGAR, VEGETABLE FAT (PALM*), WHEAT FLOUR, FAT REDUCED COCOA POWDER, WHEY POWDER, SKIM MILK POWDER, WHEAT STARCH, VEGETABLE OIL (SUNFLOWER), MILK CHOCOLATE (SUGAR, COCOA BUTTER, MILK POWDER, COCOA MASS, EMULSIFIER: LECITHINS (SOY), FLAVOURING: VANILLIN), COCOA BUTTER, EMULSIFIER: LECITHINS (SOY), WHEY PROTEIN CONCENTRATE, GLAZING AGENT (GUM ARABIC), COCOA MASS, RAISING AGENTS (SODIUM BICARBONATE, AMMONIUM BICARBONATE), SALT, FLAVOURING (VANILLIN). TOTAL COCOA CONSTITUENTS: 27.5%/ COCOA SOLIDS IN DARK CHOCOLATE: 52.5% MIN. / COCOA SOLIDS IN MILK CHOCOLATE: 38.5% MIN. CONTAINS: MILK, WHEAT (GLUTEN), SOY. MAY BE PRESENT: ALMONDS AND HAZELNUTS. MADE IN GERMANY MILK CHOCOLATE (30%) (SUGAR, COCOA BUTTER, COCOA MASS, SKIM MILK POWDER, ANHYDROUS MILKFAT, EMULSIFIER: LECITHINS (SOY), FLAVOURING: VANILLIN), HAZELNUTS (28.5%), SUGAR, VEGETABLE OIL (PALM*), WHEAT FLOUR, WHEY POWDER, FAT-REDUCED COCOA POWDER, EMULSIFIER (LECITHINS) (SOY), RAISING AGENT (SODIUM BICARBONATE), SALT, FLAVOURING (VANILLIN). TOTAL COCOA CONSTITUENTS: 16%/ COCOA SOLIDS IN MILK CHOCOLATE: 42% MIN. CONTAINS MILK, HAZELNUTS, WHEAT (GLUTEN), SOY. MADE IN GERMANY DESICCATED COCONUT (25.5%), VEGETABLE FATS (PALM*, SHEA), SUGAR, WHOLE ALMOND (8%), SKIM MILK POWDER, WHEY POWDER, WHEAT FLOUR, TAPIOCA STARCH, FLAVOURINGS, EMULSIFIER (LECITHINS) (SOY), RAISING AGENT (SODIUM BICARBONATE), SALT. CONTAINS ALMOND, MILK, WHEAT (GLUTEN), SOY. MADE IN POLAND and segregated

    • Contains Almond, Gluten, Hazelnut, Milk, Soy

    • Store in cool dry place,away from direct sunlight

    Product detail disclaimer

    Coles online aims to include in the product list up to date pictures of the products and accurate ingredients, nutritional information, country of origin and other information. However, product detail may change from time to time and there may be a delay in making updates. When precise information is important, we recommend that you read the label on the products you purchase or contact the manufacturer of the product. For therapeutic goods, always read the label and follow the directions for use on pack.


    Product price disclaimer

    Product price is displayed based on location information. Prices may vary between Coles stores and online – confirm the location you have selected is correct for price and range information near you.
